analysis_commentary: 15-min run at current best landed in the 'uniform attractor' basin: im_min=0.972, max=0.088, au=0 across 500 steps. Extra training time did NOT help — the network stayed near uniform throughout. Another data point showing seed variance dominates within the entropy=0.008 basin (1/4 runs now learn to au=5 across all replicates). Classification: regressed vs current best (au=5). No promotion.
